title: Sky's Netherite Ore Remined
description: A Vanilla-Friendly mod that adds Pure Netherite to the Nether!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccc5003743435e9ae822015257527f54f98d11ac.png)


![whatisnetheriteore](https://i.imgur.com/vS7mTnF.png)
**Netherite Ore Remined is a fan-made continuation of TheCaneOfTheTophat's mod, Netherite Ore.**

This mod adds a new way of obtaining Netherite in the Nether. Pure netherite and Pure netherite fragment are new items that drop from Netherite ore. You can craft four Fragments into one Pure netherite, smelt pure netherite into Netherite Plate and then with 4 Plates you can craft one Netherite Ingot.

![itemsblocks](https://i.imgur.com/dtrdZDy.png)

## Netherite Ore
Spawns between levels y0 - y100 and is very rare. However, you can find it on the surface if you're really lucky. Drops Pure netherite when destroyed. If you have Fortune, you can get up to 3 per 1 ore, but it's really rare.

## Pure Netherite
Material you get from breaking Netherite Ore, or crafted with fragments.

## Pure Netherite Fragment
Most common material you get from Netherite Ore.

## Netherite Plate
Material you get from smelting Pure netherite. With 4 Plates, you can craft one Netherite Ingot.
